backupPlan.description: Copy prisma/dev.db before repair to allow rollback

dryRunPlan.description: Run repair script with --dry-run flag to preview changes without writing to DB
expectedOutput: List of TTC links to be deleted
List of TTC links to be preserved
Whether new TeachingTask creation is needed

prerequisites: Dry-run must pass all safety checks
Human must confirm no active drag/drop/solver on affected tasks
operations: Verify remaining classGroups per task are non-empty
Update remark field if needed (remove 2024级 reference)
No new TeachingTask creation for CG 22 in this phase (manual review first)

rollbackPlan.description: Restore DB from backup if repair causes issues
rollbackPlan.alternativeMethod: Re-insert deleted TTC links via inverse SQL
rollbackPlan.recommendedMethod: DB backup restore (primary) — simpler and more reliable

postFixValidationPlan.description: Run validation scripts after repair to confirm correctness

commands.expect: No HIGH cross-cohort findings for tasks 168/174/176/181

safetyChecks: Remove only TTC links — never delete TeachingTask or ScheduleSlot
Verify each task has at least 1 classGroup remaining after removal
Verify ClassGroup 22 has other tasks — not orphaned
No ScheduleAdjustment references affected TTC links
Backup DB before any write operation
Dry-run must pass before apply
Freeze drag/drop/solver/export on affected tasks during repair
